text_overlays.content_summary: Brand name 'RASHAQA MEALS' with Arabic 'وجبات الرشاقة', product name 'سلطة صدور دجاج' (Chicken Breast Salad), 'جديد' (New), 'صحي ولذيذ' (Healthy & Delicious), 'حمّل تطبيق الطازج' (Download Al-Tazaj App)

soft_flags.description: No pork visible — product is clearly labeled as chicken breast (صدور دجاج). Content is halal-appropriate.
No human hands visible in image — product-only shot with no service gestures.

cultural_notes.free_notes: Al-Tazaj is a major Saudi grilled chicken chain (FMCG-aligned). This campaign emphasizes health/wellness angle ('صحي ولذيذ') and app integration — typical modern QSR positioning. Bilingual English-Arabic reflects cosmopolitan Saudi urban audience. 'جديد' (New) tag triggers interest; fresh vegetables visually communicate healthfulness. No cultural sensitivities violated. Strong alignment with health-conscious consumer segment.

pattern_matches.notes: Bowl positioned center-frame with dramatic lighting and isolation; product is the sole focus
'جديد' (New) label explicitly signals new menu item launch
English 'RASHAQA MEALS' paired with Arabic 'وجبات الرشاقة' throughout; targets bilingual Saudi audience
'جديد' (New) creates novelty interest; app download CTA is soft-invite not aggressive
Fresh salad-forward dish could appeal to warm-weather lighter eating, though not explicitly seasonal
